'''Piris''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Quarren/Legends|Quarren]] [[Captain/Legends|captain]] in the [[Galactic Alliance Defense Force]]. He commanded the Alliance warship [[Bounty (warship)|''Bounty'']] during the [[Second Galactic Civil War]].

He joined [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Cha Niathal]] during the [[Second Battle of Fondor|battle]] at [[Fondor/Legends|Fondor]] and was one of the [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance]] captains loyal to her following the end of the battle.

==Appearances==
*''[[Legacy of the Force: Sacrifice]]'' {{1st}}
*[[Legacy of the Force: Sacrifice (abridged audiobook)|''Legacy of the Force: Sacrifice'' abridged audiobook]]
*''[[Legacy of the Force: Revelation]]''
